scripts.dev:all: npm run dev:db && sleep 10 && npm run dev
scripts.install:all: cd jack-wiki-backend && bun install && cd ../jack-wiki-frontend && bun install
scripts.db:init: cd jack-wiki-backend && bun run db:push && bun run db:seed
scripts.db:reset: docker-compose down -v && docker-compose up -d && sleep 10 && npm run db:init
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run dev:db && sleep 10 && npm run db:init
